content.boundary: Bounded to workforce and support-delivery capacity; does not change identification rules, category definitions, or finance formulas governing eligibility
content.change_lever: Targeted workforce capacity-building combining regional deployment incentives, co-teaching infrastructure investment, and closing the assess-to-serve implementation gap
content.name: National specialist workforce and support-capacity expansion program
content.system_problem: Specialist workforce (gyógypedagógus) shortages are acute and regionally concentrated, waiting lists for assessment run months, and even after assessment many children do not receive legally prescribed therapy hours; rising training-program enrollment does not reliably translate into practicing workforce supply
